name: @harness/loops-heartbeat
description: ISSUE-051 (C5 LOP — FR-5.LOP.001-005). The harness loop layer that DRIVES recurring work (not the work itself): three default cadence loops (fast/medium/slow) config-extensible at boot (ADR-005 Inngest cron registered at boot), running independently/in-parallel, with a code DB-condition idle short-circuit before the orchestrator is woken (no LLM call on an idle tick — ADR-003 §5 idle floor), no-concurrent-same-loop overlap prevention (skip or queue exactly ONE pending run on overrun), single-catch-up-not-backfill dedup on missed runs (leaning on the ISSUE-048 queue + ISSUE-049 graph idempotency keys — AF-112 offline portion), per-run logging with timestamp + outcome, a detected-miss loop_missed signal, and a three-consecutive-failure loop-failure heartbeat that is NEVER silent (#3). Reads task_queue + task_graph_versions; WRITES only event_log. No new table (ISOLATION). Port + in-memory fake reference model; supabase-store.ts is the live pg adapter authored to the baseline DDL — NOT run live (AF-112 LOAD/EVAL owed at the Stage-4 checkpoint).
